# GBS TILE INC.
> Expert tile installation for kitchens, bathrooms, and living spaces in Houston, TX. Family owned since 1998.

## Business
- Name: GBS TILE INC.
- Type: HomeAndConstructionBusiness
- Phone: (832) 428-7769
- Address: 2411 Karbach St Suite 5, Houston, TX 77092
- Area Served: Houston, TX
- Website: https://yourwebsiteexample.com/gbstile/

## Services
- Floor Tile Installation
- Bathroom Tile
- Kitchen Backsplash
- Shower Tile
- Custom Tile Work
- Tile Repair

## Frequently Asked Questions
**How much does tile installation cost in Houston?**
Tile installation in Houston typically ranges from $8 to $25 per square foot depending on tile material, pattern complexity, and subfloor prep required. We provide free estimates for all projects.

**How long does tile installation take?**
A standard bathroom floor can be tiled in 1 to 2 days. Larger projects like full kitchen floors or shower surrounds may take 3 to 5 days including setting time before grouting.

**Are you a licensed tile contractor?**
Yes. GBS TILE INC. is a fully licensed and insured tile contractor in Texas with over 25 years of experience serving the Houston area.

**What types of tile do you install?**
We install ceramic, porcelain, natural stone, marble, travertine, glass, and mosaic tile for floors, walls, showers, backsplashes, and outdoor spaces.

**What Houston neighborhoods do you serve?**
We serve all of Houston and surrounding areas including Katy, Sugar Land, The Woodlands, Pearland, Pasadena, and Cypress.
